descriptionEn: Damage +1. Reaches one-hit grass with root.
After a clean patch, move speed +20% for 2s.
Hits have a 5% chance to ignite grass.
Rocks start appearing (1 every 10s). They block grass nearby.
Every 6th attack performs a 0.85m circle cut.
Map can auto-grow up to +6m larger.
Map can auto-grow up to +8m more.
Map can auto-grow up to +10m more.
Map can auto-grow up to +12m more.
Trees start appearing. Grass grows faster around them.
Blue grass slows only 1/6 instead of 1/3.
Tree stumps stop blocking after break.

descriptionKo: 장애물 파괴 시 주변 풀 제거
descriptionEn: Obstacle breaks also cut nearby grass.
Each extra chained bomb gives +30 score.
Every 12s, stamps a 2.4m crop mark after a 0.4s warning.
Tool: moving continuously mows a 1.2m front strip, turn response -15%.
Every 8th attack fires a 6m beam that can trigger bombs.
Opens the summon branch of auto-fighting abilities.
Deploy a drone that roams the map mowing grass below it.
Strike a random spot with lightning that burns grass.
Conjure a tornado that weaves across the map sweeping grass.
Summon a tractor that drives across the map mowing a wide strip.
Summon a shadow clone that mows grass at random spots (half your damage).
Up to 2 shadow clones at once.
Up to 3 shadow clones at once.
Shadow clone reaches full player damage.
Launch a scythe forward that stops and spins, mowing grass.
Throw 2 scythes spread in a fan.
Throw 3 scythes spread in a fan.
Throw 4 scythes spread in a fan.
Throw 5 scythes spread in a fan.
Scythe spins 2 more times before fading.
Scythe spins 2 more times before fading.
Throw a scythe that flies out and returns, cutting both ways.
